data.title: First Keystone Maintains Quarterly Dividend Amid Profit Rebound
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

First Keystone ( (FKYS) ) has shared an update.

On March 4, 2026, First Keystone Corporation declared a first-quarter cash dividend of $0.28 per share, payable March 31, 2026 to shareholders of record on March 12, 2026, maintaining the same payout as in the first quarter of 2025. The company noted that the financial data supporting this decision remain subject to change pending completion and filing of its consolidated financial statements.

The bank reported that for the year ended December 31, 2025, assets rose 7.3% to $1.53 billion, loans were essentially flat at $948.9 million and deposits climbed 8.8% to $1.14 billion. Net interest income increased 16.8% to $37.7 million, while net income surged 157.7% to $7.6 million, or $1.22 per share, underscoring a sharp profitability rebound that supports the steady dividend and reinforces its positioning as a preferred local financial services provider.

The most recent analyst rating on (FKYS) stock is a Buy with a $21.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on First Keystone stock, see the FKYS Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on FKYS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, FKYS is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held back by mixed financial performance—profitability weakness and higher leverage offset revenue growth and positive but pressured cash flow. Technicals are supportive with an uptrend, though momentum is stretched. Valuation and dividend yield provide some support, and recent corporate updates are broadly positive.

To see Spark’s full report on FKYS stock, click here.

More about First Keystone

First Keystone Corporation, parent of First Keystone Community Bank, operates as a community-focused financial services provider offering business and personal banking products. The bank emphasizes traditional service with forward-looking innovation and maintains a regional footprint in Pennsylvania, with branches across Columbia, Luzerne, Montour, Monroe and Northampton counties.

Average Trading Volume: 1,968

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $121.9M

data.title: Telescope Innovations Installs Second Self-Driving Lab at Pfizer, Advancing Physical AI Deployment
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Telescope Innovations Corp ( (TSE:TELI) ) is now available.

Telescope Innovations has installed a second Self-Driving Laboratory at Pfizer under a multi-year agreement, marking a shift from collaborative R&D toward potential broader deployment of its Physical AI platforms. The fixed-position lab combines collaborative robotics, real-time analytics and machine-learning-guided experimental design to run autonomous, 24/7 chemistry workflows and claims to speed synthesis development by up to 100 times versus manual methods.

Management framed the additional Pfizer installation as validation of the company’s technology and partnership with a leading drug maker, highlighting the SDL’s potential to cut drug development costs and compress development cycles. Executives also emphasized that the SDL’s closed-loop architecture can be applied across multiple verticals that demand rapid optimization of chemical and materials processes, reinforcing Telescope’s positioning in the rapidly expanding market for self-driving lab automation.

More about Telescope Innovations Corp

Telescope Innovations Corp. develops intelligent automation and advanced chemical manufacturing technologies for biopharmaceutical, specialty chemical and advanced materials markets. Its core offerings include flexible robotic platforms, artificial intelligence software and fully autonomous Self-Driving Labs that boost experimental throughput, efficiency and data quality in process development.

The company’s Physical AI platforms plan, execute and analyze chemical experiments far more efficiently than traditional manual methods, helping clients accelerate process optimization and shorten the time and cost from laboratory work to commercial deployment.

Average Trading Volume: 140,426

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$28.27M

data.title: Uniserve Advances Vancouver Data Centre to Anchor Sovereign SMB Infrastructure Strategy
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Uniserve Communications ( (TSE:USS) ) has shared an update.

Uniserve Communications is advancing construction of its flagship Vancouver data centre, a key asset in its shift from a traditional service provider to a vertically integrated digital infrastructure platform tailored to Canadian SMBs. The facility is designed to support high-availability cloud, AI-ready workloads, secure data residency, and scalable managed services, strengthening the company’s sovereign, compliance-focused positioning.

Phase one of the data centre buildout remains on schedule and is expected to be operational by September 2026, while a BC Hydro commitment to deliver up to 3MW of power by 2028 underpins a second phase of expansion. Management says the project will enhance margins, enable higher-value services and cross-selling, and better position Uniserve to capture underserved demand from SMBs facing cloud, cybersecurity, AI, and regulatory challenges, with Ace Capital Partners engaged to support its capital markets strategy.

More about Uniserve Communications

Uniserve Communications is a Canadian provider of managed IT, internet, cloud, and data centre services, with offices in Vancouver, Calgary, and Waterloo. The company focuses on delivering secure, reliable, and customized digital infrastructure solutions for small and mid-sized businesses through data centre solutions, managed IT services, and business internet offerings.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: EEII Calls Extraordinary Meeting to Approve Capital Increase for Jubin Frères Reverse Takeover
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

EEII AG ( (CH:EEII) ) has shared an update.

EEII AG has convened an Extraordinary General Meeting in Zug on March 26, 2026, to seek shareholder approval for a capital increase tied to the reverse takeover of Jubin Frères S.A. The plan includes issuing new shares for a contribution in kind to acquire Jubin Frères and additional cash contributions via private placements at CHF 7.10 per share, alongside a share split and amendments to the articles of association, including a change of corporate purpose.

The capital increase and related measures are intended to strengthen EEII’s activities and support its development, while facilitating a move of all company shares to the Sparks regulatory standard of SIX Swiss Exchange by the end of March 2026. Successful completion of the transaction, which remains subject to several regulatory, valuation and shareholder approvals, would mark a strategic shift in EEII’s operations and is aimed at creating additional value for shareholders versus the company’s current structure.

The most recent analyst rating on (CH:EEII) stock is a Sell with a CHF2.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on EEII AG stock, see the CH:EEII Stock Forecast page.

More about EEII AG

EEII AG is a Switzerland-based investment company listed on the SIX Swiss Exchange, focusing on energy and infrastructure assets. Its strategy targets long-term returns through stakes in energy distribution businesses, particularly fuel retail and convenience-store operations at filling stations across Switzerland and Europe.

Average Trading Volume: 360

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: CHF2.29M

data.title: Jack in the Box Shareholders Ratify Rights Plan Extension
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Jack In The Box ( (JACK) ) has provided an announcement.

On February 27, 2026, Jack in the Box stockholders ratified the Board’s Stockholder Protection Rights Agreement, originally adopted in July 2025 and amended in September 2025, extending its expiration to July 1, 2028, unless earlier terminated or superseded by certain corporate transactions. The continuation of this rights plan is aimed at safeguarding the company’s shareholder base and corporate control structure, reinforcing defenses against potential accumulation of significant stakes that could impact governance or strategic direction.

At the same annual meeting on February 27, 2026, shareholders elected all ten director nominees and approved all four other proposals, including ratification of KPMG LLP as auditor for fiscal 2026 and an advisory endorsement of executive compensation for fiscal 2025. Investors also backed an amendment to the 2023 Omnibus Incentive Plan to increase shares available for issuance, signaling support for the company’s governance, leadership, and long-term incentive framework while ratifying the rights plan as part of its capital and control strategy.

The most recent analyst rating on (JACK) stock is a Hold with a $18.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Jack In The Box stock, see the JACK Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on JACK Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, JACK is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by deteriorating profitability and a highly leveraged, negative-equity balance sheet, with weak technical momentum reinforcing downside risk. A high dividend yield and management’s debt-reduction actions provide some support, but current operating pressure and refinancing/leverage concerns remain the dominant factors.

To see Spark’s full report on JACK stock, click here.

More about Jack In The Box

Jack in the Box Inc. operates in the quick-service restaurant industry, focusing on fast-food offerings such as burgers, chicken sandwiches, tacos, sides, and beverages. The company primarily serves value-oriented consumers in the U.S. through its franchised and company-operated restaurant network, competing with major national and regional fast-food chains in a highly competitive market segment.

Average Trading Volume: 608,167

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $289M

data.title: Ameren Issues $400 Million Senior Notes for Utilities
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Ameren ( (AEE) ) has shared an update.

On March 4, 2026, Ameren Corporation issued $400 million of 5.00% Senior Notes due 2036, accessing long-term debt markets to support its regulated utility operations and capital needs. The notes were sold under an existing shelf registration, and Ameren received approximately $396.6 million in net proceeds before expenses, reflecting continued investor demand for its credit and potentially reinforcing its balance sheet and funding flexibility.

The transaction underscores Ameren’s reliance on capital markets to finance infrastructure and other long-duration utility investments, which are critical to its service obligations and regulatory commitments. By locking in fixed-rate funding over a 10-year horizon, Ameren may better align its financing structure with asset lifecycles, potentially stabilizing funding costs and offering greater visibility for bondholders and other stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (AEE) stock is a Buy with a $127.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Ameren stock, see the AEE Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on AEE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AEE is a Neutral.

The score is primarily driven by steady regulated-utility profitability and a positive earnings outlook (affirmed guidance, long-term EPS CAGR targets, and large-load agreements). The main constraints are financial structure and cash flow—high/rising leverage and consistently negative free cash flow tied to heavy capex—while technicals are supportive but look overbought, and valuation is reasonable with a solid dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on AEE stock, click here.

More about Ameren

Ameren Corporation is a U.S. regulated electric and natural gas utility holding company that generates, transmits, and distributes energy to residential, commercial, and industrial customers. The company focuses on providing reliable utility services across its Midwestern service territories under a tightly regulated framework that shapes its financing and capital investment decisions.

Average Trading Volume: 1,832,420

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $30.96B

data.title: Sirius XM Announces Tender Offer for 2026 Senior Notes
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from Sirius XM Holdings ( (SIRI) ).

On March 4, 2026, Sirius XM Holdings announced the pricing terms for a previously launched cash tender offer by subsidiary Sirius XM Radio LLC to purchase any and all of its outstanding 3.125% Senior Notes due September 1, 2026, setting a purchase price of $994.64 per $1,000 principal amount plus accrued interest. The offer, scheduled to expire at 5:00 p.m. New York time on March 4, 2026, is not subject to a minimum tender condition and is expected to be funded with proceeds from a contemporaneous senior notes offering and cash on hand, potentially followed by redemption or satisfaction and discharge of any remaining notes, marking another step in the company’s ongoing balance sheet management.

Holders whose notes are accepted will receive accrued and unpaid interest to, but not including, the initial payment date expected on March 5, 2026, with guaranteed delivery settlements anticipated by March 9, 2026, subject to the offer’s conditions. The transaction framework gives SiriusXM flexibility to retire or defease its 2026 notes through the tender and, if needed, subsequent redemption actions, which could reduce near-term debt maturities and interest costs while reshaping its capital structure without obligating the company to purchase a minimum amount of notes.

The most recent analyst rating on (SIRI) stock is a Hold with a $23.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Sirius XM Holdings stock, see the SIRI Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SIRI Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SIRI is a Neutral.

The score is primarily supported by strong and improving free cash flow and an attractive valuation (low P/E and high dividend yield). Offsetting these positives are historically volatile profitability and a mostly neutral technical setup, while guidance points to stable operations with modest FCF improvement but ongoing subscriber and subscription-revenue pressure.

To see Spark’s full report on SIRI stock, click here.

More about Sirius XM Holdings

Sirius XM Holdings Inc. is a leading North American audio entertainment company, operating the SiriusXM subscription radio service, Pandora’s ad-supported and premium music streaming platforms, a broad podcast network, and related advertising and business solutions. The company reaches about 170 million monthly listeners with live, on-demand and curated content spanning music, talk, news and sports across multiple distribution channels.

Average Trading Volume: 4,824,435

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: $7.44B

See more data about SIRI stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Sage Group plc ( (GB:SGE) ) has shared an update.

The Sage Group plc has repurchased 437,726 of its ordinary shares on the London Stock Exchange and multilateral trading facilities from Morgan Stanley as part of the share buyback programme launched on 2 March 2026. The shares were bought at prices ranging between 826.6 pence and 855 pence, with a volume-weighted average price of 837.15 pence, and the company plans to cancel all repurchased shares.

By cancelling the stock, Sage will reduce its share count, which can enhance earnings per share and signal confidence in its financial position and cash generation. The transaction underscores an ongoing capital returns strategy that may support the share price and offers existing investors a larger proportional stake in the software group’s future cash flows.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:SGE) stock is a Hold with a £1340.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Sage Group plc stock, see the GB:SGE Stock Forecast page.

The score is driven primarily by strong financial performance and a constructive earnings outlook with margin expansion and durable recurring revenue growth. This is tempered by very weak technicals (downtrend and heavy negative momentum) and a valuation that remains relatively expensive on P/E despite a moderate dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:SGE stock, click here.

data.title: Smarter Web Company Joins FTSE All-Share and SmallCap Indices After Main Market Move
data.description:

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Smarter Web Company PLC ( (GB:SWC) ) has shared an announcement.

The Smarter Web Company PLC has been added to the FTSE All-Share and FTSE SmallCap indices following the latest FTSE Russell quarterly review, shortly after its move to the London Stock Exchange’s Main Market. The index inclusion is expected to boost the company’s visibility, attract a wider pool of institutional and passive investors, and improve liquidity in its shares.

Management presents this step as validation of its strategy of combining a cash-generative digital services business with a Bitcoin-backed balance sheet, positioning the firm as a differentiated, higher-profile player in the UK small-cap technology and services space. The company also highlights that its Bitcoin treasury policy exposes it to significant crypto-market volatility and regulatory uncertainty, underlining both the innovative appeal and the risk profile that current and prospective shareholders must weigh.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:SWC) stock is a Hold with a £32.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Smarter Web Company PLC stock, see the GB:SWC Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GB:SWC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:SWC is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak operating performance and continued cash burn despite a stronger, low-leverage balance sheet. Technicals show soft momentum with near-oversold signals, while valuation looks only moderate at a ~24.7 P/E without dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:SWC stock, click here.

More about Smarter Web Company PLC

The Smarter Web Company PLC is a UK-based provider of web design, web development and online marketing services, operating on a model of upfront fees, annual hosting charges and optional monthly marketing retainers. The company is pursuing both organic expansion and acquisitions to grow its client base and recurring revenues, while integrating a Bitcoin-focused treasury strategy into its broader growth plans.

Current Market Cap: £111.7M
